name: Rama Steel Tubes Limited
summary: Rama Steel Tubes Limited manufactures and trades steel pipes and tubes, and rigid poly vinyl chloride and galvanised iron pipes worldwide. It offers ERW galvanized steel pipes and tubes, ERW black steel pipes and tubes, scaffolding pipes and tubes, pre grooved pipes, swaged poles, telecommunication transmission towers and substation structures, hollow sections, cold rolled coils/sheets, galvanized plain coils/sheets, galvanized corrugated sheets, and color coated coils/sheets. The company also exports its products to the United Kingdom, the United Arab Emirates, Sri Lanka, Ethiopia, Kenya, Uganda, Ghana, Kuwait, the Republic of Congo, Yemen, Guyana, Germany, the United States, South Africa, Zambia, Malta, etc. Rama Steel Tubes Limited was founded in 1974 and is based in New Delhi, India.
